judgment.summary: Zoom maintains exceptional margins and a massive cash position but faces headwinds from slowing revenue growth and negative analyst outlooks.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 1.44 missed the 1.49 estimate by 3.1%, with the next earnings date on 2026-05-21.
positives: Profit margin of 39.0% shows high bottom-line efficiency.
Gross margin of 77.4% is very strong.
Total cash of $7.82B vs $58.48M in debt provides a massive liquidity cushion.
Free cash flow of $1.96B (TTM) demonstrates strong cash generation.
negatives: Revenue growth is low at 5.3% YoY.
PEG ratio of 4.21 suggests the stock is expensive relative to growth.
Analyst growth estimates for the current quarter and fiscal year are both negative.

news.paragraph: Zoom Communications is seeing conflicting market signals, with recent reports noting that shares have plummeted and an insider has fully reduced their stake. Despite this downward pressure, Citigroup has raised its price target from $106 to $122 while maintaining a buy rating. Traders should weigh this recent volatility and insider selling against the upgraded analyst outlook.
